sources.title: Blast (Full Movie) Action, US Olympics Thriller, Rutger Hauer
sources.description:
Terrorists are holding the U.S. Olympic swim team hostage, and only janitor Jack Bryant (Linden Ashby) can stop them.

Directed by Albert Pyun
Starring Linden Ashby, Rutger Hauer, Andrew Divoff, Kimberly Warren, Tim Thomerson, Sonya Eddy
1997

Edited for YouTube ad standards

metadata.Plot: Terrorists attempt to disrupt the Atlanta Olympics by kidnapping the U.S. women's swim team. If their demands are not met, the team will be executed. Only janitor Jack Bryant (Linden Ashby), a former Olympic gymnast champion of Tae Kwon Do felled by injuries and alcoholism knows of their real plans. And only he, with the guidance of former terrorist-fighter Leo (Rutger Hauer), can stop them.
metadata.Actors: Linden Ashby, Andrew Divoff, Kimberly Warren
